历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 64, 80, 55, 58, and 64 respectively. Over the past 5 years, rankings fluctuated between 55 and 80. In 2022, due to factors such as exam difficulty, the ranking shifted to 80. From 2023 to 2025, it stabilized in the 55–64 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 64. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Shanxi Province: 22 students in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 28 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27 students, a decrease of 1 student (approximately 3.6% reduction) compared to 2025's 28 students. The reduction is very small and has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranked 2nd, firmly at the national top level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety and admission controversies, but as a national top-tier institution, negative public opinion has minimal impact on application enthusiasm. On Douyin, it ranks 3rd in overall popularity (high heat), with extremely high attention on short video platforms. Peking University has over 40 A- or above disciplines, with Science-related A+ disciplines including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Mechanics, Electronic Science and Technology, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc., making its disciplinary strength nationally top-tier.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended) and other advantageous major categories at Peking University continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, Shanxi Province has 167,419 Physics Category examinees, a decrease of approximately 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight decline in total examinees and a slight easing of competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 419 points, and the special type admission control line was 507 points. Peking University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Shanxi Province. Shanxi Province accounts for approximately 2%–5% of Peking University's national enrollment, a moderately low level, with no significant regional preference impact.
8.【Prediction Conclusion】Considering the historical ranking fluctuation in the 55–80 range, the slight reduction of 1 student in 2026 (slightly intensified competition) and the slight decrease of 3.4% in the total number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province (slightly eased competition) as a two-way hedge, along with Peking University's strong appeal as a national top-tier institution, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 63, with a range of 53–73.

The predicted ranking is about 63, with a range of 53–73. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 53 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Yuanpei, Mathematics, Computer Science); candidates with rankings around 63 should primarily target Tier 2 majors, supplemented by Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings around 73 can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. All majors at Peking University have top-tier discipline evaluations, and even Tier 3 majors have extremely high value.
